title: Safety First Aid Group Workplace First Aid Kit (Small 1-10 Persons) Economy HSE-Compliant with Inspection Tags, Wall Bracket, Extra Plasters
features: Fully-stocked first aid kit from a leading UK manufacturer specifically designed for the busy office, kitchen, construction site or any other active workplace
Includes emergency eye wash pods and additional plasters
Durable and portable case with carrying handle
Wall bracket included for ease of visibility, storage and access
description: The HSE Workplace Kit, Small provides small workplaces of between 1 and 10 employees with all the necessary first aid supplies to meet HSE workplace guidance, ensuring appropriate first aid can be delivered. The kit provides comprehensive first aid for any small workplace, and includes additional plasters and eye wash pods to ensure you don't run out of these frequent-use items. The wall bracket, inspection tag and tamper-proof studs allow for careful maintenance and protection of your first aid kit, while keeping it visible and accessible to employees. The HSE Workplace Kit is also available in the following sizes: - Large - Medium.
